conversation:
Agent: Thank you for calling NetWave support, this is Riya. How can I help you today?
Customer: Hi, my internet has been down since last night.
Agent: I’m sorry about that. May I have your full name?
Customer: Arjun Mehta.
Agent: Thanks, Arjun. Could you confirm your registered phone number?
Customer: I don't want to reveal that.
Agent: Got it. What’s your service address?
Customer: Flat 302, Green Park Apartments, Sector 14, Bengaluru.
Agent: Understood. Which router model are you using?
Customer: NetWave X1200.
Agent: Are any lights blinking red on the router?
Customer: Yes, the LOS light is red.
Agent: Noted. When did you first notice the issue?
Customer: Around 10:30 PM yesterday.
Agent: I’ll run a line test. Please hold.
Agent: Thanks for waiting. There seems to be a fiber fault in your area.
Customer: Okay, when will it be fixed?
Agent: Estimated restoration is by 6:00 PM today.
Customer: Please raise a complaint ticket.
Agent: Done. Your ticket ID is NW-458921.
Customer: Thanks.
